name: Coherent / Coherent 光电
sector: Optical components and lasers / 光通信与激光器件
summary: Coherent 提供光模块、激光器和光子器件，是 AI 数据中心高速互连和光通信链条的重要公司。 / Coherent provides optical transceivers, lasers, and photonics components, making it an important company in AI data-center high-speed interconnect and optical communications.
summaryZh: Coherent 提供光模块、激光器和光子器件，是 AI 数据中心高速互连和光通信链条的重要公司。
summaryEn: Coherent provides optical transceivers, lasers, and photonics components, making it an important company in AI data-center high-speed interconnect and optical communications.

business.description: 公司提供材料、网络、激光、光通信和工业/电子器件，数据中心光模块需求是 AI 相关重点。 / The company provides materials, networking, lasers, optical communications, and industrial/electronics components, with data-center optics as the AI-related focus.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供材料、网络、激光、光通信和工业/电子器件，数据中心光模块需求是 AI 相关重点。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides materials, networking, lasers, optical communications, and industrial/electronics components, with data-center optics as the AI-related focus.
revenueModel: 材料与工业器件 / materials and industrial components

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。

business.thesis: AI 集群规模扩大提升光模块和高速互连需求，Coherent 位于数据中心网络的光器件供给层。 / AI cluster scale raises demand for optical modules and high-speed interconnects, placing Coherent in the optical-component supply layer of data-center networks.
business.thesisZh: AI 集群规模扩大提升光模块和高速互连需求，Coherent 位于数据中心网络的光器件供给层。
business.thesisEn: AI cluster scale raises demand for optical modules and high-speed interconnects, placing Coherent in the optical-component supply layer of data-center networks.
riskNotes: 光模块价格、客户认证和产能利用率会影响利润率。 / Optical-module pricing, customer qualification, and utilization affect margins.
电互连、CPO 和不同速率路线竞争会改变需求结构。 / Electrical interconnect, CPO, and speed transitions can change demand mix.

themeExposure.rationale: AI 数据中心带宽需求推动高速光模块和光器件升级，Coherent 处于网络互连物理层。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: AI 数据中心带宽需求推动高速光模块和光器件升级，Coherent 处于网络互连物理层。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: AI data-center bandwidth demand drives high-speed optical module and component upgrades, placing Coherent in the physical networking layer.
